mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_approval_template (template_name, ticket_type, description, enabled) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{ticketType.code}, #{description}, #{enabled})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_name, ticket_type, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_approval_template WHERE ticket_type = #{ticketType} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
